hooks.command: $ok=$false; try{$ok=(Invoke-WebRequest 'http://localhost:3000/health' -TimeoutSec 2 -UseBasicParsing).StatusCode -eq 200}catch{}; if(-not $ok){Start-Process cmd -ArgumentList '/c','npm run dev' -NoNewWindow; for($i=0;$i-lt20;$i++){Start-Sleep 1;try{if((Invoke-WebRequest 'http://localhost:3000/health' -TimeoutSec 1 -UseBasicParsing).StatusCode -eq 200){break}}catch{}}}
